name: @forwardimpact/svcoauth
description: OAuth 2.1 authorization server adapter — protocol-only HTTP front that delegates to a configured provider backend over gRPC.
author: D. Olsson <hi@senzilla.io>

jobs.goal: Expose an OAuth 2.1 authorization server without provider-specific code
jobs.trigger: A new identity provider needs to plug into the same authorization flow without changing the protocol layer.
jobs.bigHire: serve standard OAuth 2.1 endpoints that delegate every provider-specific step to a gRPC backend, keeping the HTTP surface provider-agnostic.
jobs.littleHire: redirect an authorize request to the upstream provider and exchange a callback code for a downstream token.
jobs.competesWith: per-provider HTTP services that mix OAuth protocol handling with provider-specific exchange logic
